title: Chartoloma platycarpum
taxonomy: Chartoloma platycarpum is classified as a species within the family Celastraceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the staff vine family. This family includes a variety of plants, many of which are native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. The Celastraceae family is further divided into several subfamilies and tribes, with Chartoloma platycarpum falling within the tribe Celastreae. Members of the Celastraceae family are known for their distinctive flowers and berries, and are often used in traditional medicine. The classification of Chartoloma platycarpum provides insight into its evolutionary relationships with other plants.
